form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.9 len at Wyong Mid Mdn-Sw March 28 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating She's A Dame with 59kg at $1.60. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 9 at Hawkesbury 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind The Iron Star carrying 59kg at $3.20. Has upside and can run his usual honest race.

formComments.title: TAB

The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 9 at Hawkesbury 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind The Iron Star carrying 59kg at $3.20. Has upside and can run his usual honest race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start shifted out and bumped Yesglenn.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Cl1-Sw on March 24 over 1800m, slow going 3.5 len behind Highland Hustle carrying 59kg at $3.60. The start before that 5th of 11 at Taree Cl1-Sw on March 10 over 1600m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Ngunnawal carrying 59kg at $5. Slim place contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 600m, hampered and carried wider by Highland Hustle.
Raced keenly through the early and middle stages when leading.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 9 at Hawkesbury Cond Bm68 on March 26 over 2000m, 18 len behind Falcon Lair with 55.5kg at $19. The start before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a head at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn March 3 over 1500m on a heavy track defeating Aurora Effect carrying 56kg at $9. Better than the last run suggests and deserves another chance.

Better than the last run suggests and deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages and refused to settle.
On jumping shifted out and made contact with Tsarevich.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 6th of 9 at Hawkesbury Cl1 on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Seastraand carrying 56kg at $6. Last start 3rd in a small field at Goulburn Cl1 on March 22 over 1300m, slow going 2.75 len behind Hazel Jean carrying 57.5kg at $4.40. One of the major players who will relish the 1600m.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today. First-up 6th of 9 at Hawkesbury Cl1 on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Seastraand carrying 56kg at $6. form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up won by a nose at Wyong Super Mdn-Sw February 26 over 1350m in soft going defeating Zamazing with 58.5kg at $5.50. Last start eased back early on 6th of 8 at Wyong Cl1 on April 4 over 1300m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Easiest Choice with 56.5kg at $13. Worth another chance on the quick back-up.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Third-up today. First-up won by a nose at Wyong Super Mdn-Sw February 26 over 1350m in soft going defeating Zamazing with 58.5kg at $5.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out and bumped The Victorious.
Raced keenly and got its head up in the early stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th in a small field at Goulburn Cl1 on March 22 over 1300m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Hazel Jean carrying 58kg at $6. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Hawkesbury Mdn-Sw on September 25 over 1500m, nose behind The Pearls with 53kg at $3.30. Progressive filly who rates highly over this trip.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 900m, steadied from the heels of Senjutsu.
Raced keenly in the early stages.
Slow to begin. Near the 300m made contact with Next Jen on two occasions.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 5th of 7 at Wyong Prov Cl1 on March 28 over 1350m, slow going 5.5 len behind Olivia Twist carrying 55kg at $81. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Scone Bm58 on August 25 over 1400m, in the wet; 2 len behind Dawn County carrying 60kg at $9. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

form.formComment: Returns from a 60-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Cl1-Sw on February 8 over 1812m, 10 len behind Kahraba with 57kg at $9.50. The start before that eased back early on 3rd in a small field at Port Macquarie Cl1-Sw on January 1 over 1815m, 2.25 len behind Think Of One with 57kg at $3.90. Happy to risk.
